name: GEOFlow
description: Open-source GEO content production system with AI tasks, review workflow, and publishing.

name: antivibe
description: Learn what AI writes, not just accept it. A Claude Code skill that turns AI-generated code into educational deep dives.

name: yupi-skill
description: 🐟 程序员鱼皮 Agent Skill｜把自己蒸馏成 AI 技能包，用我的思维方式和表达风格回答编程学习、求职面试、AI 编程、简历优化、技术选型、创业经验等问题。支持 Claude Code / Cursor / OpenClaw

name: design-extract
description: Extract the complete design language from any website — colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and more. npx CLI + Claude Code plugin.

name: OmniVoice-Studio
description: A Cinematic audio dubbing, Cloning and voice generation studio

name: litmus
description: ⚡ Unit tests for AI. Test prompts, compare models, save money.

name: free-ai-tools
description: Curated list of free and low cost AI tools, LLM APIs, IDEs, agents, and infrastructure for building real AI apps

name: Leeway
description: A workflow-driven AI agent framework that executes YAML-defined decision trees. Bridging rigid automation and unpredictable agents

name: cs-net
description: CS-NET is a Transformer-based deep learning framework for analyzing Counter-Strike 2 match replays (.dem demo files). It parses match recordings, converts game states into token sequences, and uses pre-trained Transformer models for multiple real-time predictions.

name: naotab
description: A Chrome extension that turns your browser tabs into a personal knowledge base — save tabs with context, auto-tag with AI, and visualize connections as a network graph.
